generations.generated_text:
The question asks which external solvers can be used in AMReX.

From the provided text:
- AMReX supports HYPRE as an option for bottom solver of linear solvers (AMReX_HYPRE).
- AMReX supports PETSc as an option for bottom solver of linear solvers (AMReX_PETSC).
- AMReX supports HPGMG via the MLMG module (MLMG/AMReX_MLMG.H, etc.).

Therefore, all listed solvers (BoomerAMG/SMG from HYPRE, Krylov subspace solvers from PETSc, PFMG from HPGMG) are supported.

D
